title: Unauthorized Airside Access
description: An individual is detected attempting to access an airside gate without authorization. Multiple systems trigger alerts in quick succession.

event.details: Door forced open — unauthorized attempt at Gate B4
Unidentified individual without visible ID lanyard detected in airside zone
Access denied — badge ID 77421 does not have airside clearance for Gate B4
Intercom call received from Gate B4 — caller states they are lost

optimal_response.secondary_action: lock down Gate B4 via SCMT
optimal_response.do_not: Do not unlock the gate until identity is confirmed
optimal_response.escalation: If individual is unidentified or flees, escalate to Level 5 and notify APD
